occurrence_sentence: The brains behind it all, CEO and co-founder Dr. Joseph Geraci, a Canadian mathematician, medical scientist and quantum machine learning specialist, believes Netramark Corp has _'created a system that has proven itself to be great at cracking open disease and explaining what is going on within each subtype that it discovers'_.
